creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
www/ruby-http-access was superceded by www/rubygem-httpclient. Main page isn't available, distfile isn't available on mastersite. No other ports depends on this one, so it should be safe to remove with notifying users that they should use www/rubygem-httpclient instead.

According to http://raa.ruby-lang.org/project/http-access2/:
"""
Status:	deprecated
Dependency: http-access2 has been renamed to httpclient
Description:
superseded by httpclient: <URL:http://raa.ruby-lang.org/project/httpclient/>
"""

and http://raa.ruby-lang.org/project/httpclient/:

"""
httpclient formerly known as http-access2.
"""
